page.title: Account Management
page.notifyApiUrl: When order is updated, notification will be sent to specified API URL
page.secret: This is your secret key, it will only show once, please save it safely, do not share it with anyone.

register.title: Create your account
register.password_hint: At least 8 characters, with a letter and a digit
register.terms: I have read and agree to the
register.success_body: We sent a verification link to {email}. Click it to activate your account.
register.resend_success: If the account exists, the verification email was resent

verify.title: Verifying email
verify.invalid: This link is invalid or has already been used

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.description: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
forgot.success: If the account exists, a reset email was sent

reset.title: Set new password
reset.description: Enter your new password to complete the reset.
reset.no_token: Missing reset link. Please request forgot-password again.

password.title: Password
password.set_local_hint: You registered via Google. Setting a local password also lets you log in with email + password.

carriers.page_subtitle: Manage your linked carrier accounts used at outbound for label generation
carriers.empty: You haven't linked any carrier account yet
carriers.delete_confirm_body: This will soft-delete the account. Past shipments still reference it but it can no longer be used for new shipments.

wallet.title: My Wallet
wallet.subtitle: Manage your balance and transactions
wallet.negative_warning: Your account is in negative; please top up to avoid shipment issues

topup.title: Request topup
topup.submit_success_body: Our team will confirm shortly; once approved you'll see the balance updated.

admin_wallet.approve_confirm_body: Will credit HKD${amount} to the client's wallet. This action cannot be undone.
admin_wallet.reject_reason_placeholder: e.g. Cannot locate transfer / amount mismatch

inbound_v1.page_subtitle: Manage shipments declared to our warehouse

new.title: New inbound
new.tracking_no_duplicate_warning: You already have this tracking number on the same carrier
new.consolidated_hint: Combine with other inbounds before shipping
new.single_hint: Ship directly; requires linked carrier account
new.continue_success: Created <link>{id}</link>. You can keep adding (warehouse / carrier / size settings preserved).
new.validation_no_items: At least one item is required

cancel_dialog.title: Cancel this inbound?
cancel_dialog.body: Cannot be undone but you can re-create with the same tracking number.

abandon_dialog.title: ⚠️ Abandon shipment
abandon_dialog.warning_1: 1. You give up ownership; goods will be disposed of by [your company]
abandon_dialog.warning_2: 2. The HKD$5 processing fee is non-refundable

wms_scan.abandon_banner: ⚠️ {n} shipments abandoned by clients — do not receive
wms_scan.unclaimed_note_placeholder: e.g. no sender / client code on box / 'ABC Trading'

unclaimed_ui.match_existing_subtitle: This tracking is also in a pending inbound of:
unclaimed_ui.dispose_dialog_warning: ⚠️ Irreversible. Physical disposal follows business SOP
unclaimed_ui.pending_confirm_subtitle: Unclaimed shipments the warehouse has assigned to you
unclaimed_ui.accept_warning: ⚠️ CS-assigned shipments use consolidated shipping. For single-direct, create a separate outbound.

shelf_pick.shelf_cleared: Shelf cleared, on to the next
shelf_pick.empty: Nothing to pick on this shelf

outbound_v1.page_subtitle: Manage your outbound shipments and carrier labels

list.batch_hint: Tick rows waiting for confirmation to fetch labels in one go. 1 = single fetch, N = batch fetch (same carrier + destination).

new.title: Create outbound
new.no_eligible_inbounds: No eligible inbounds (need status=received and shipment_type=consolidated)
new.balance_insufficient: Balance insufficient; outbound will be held after submit until topup
new.preference_auto_desc: System fetches the label automatically once weight is verified
new.preference_confirm_desc: I want to confirm the price before label is fetched
new.select_inbounds: Please select at least one inbound
new.missing_quote_fields: Pick a carrier and destination first
new.disallow_consolidation_label: Do not consolidate with other outbounds (even same receiver address)
new.disallow_consolidation_hint_default: By default, outbounds for the same client + same receiver address may be consolidated to save shipping cost. Tick to opt out.
new.disallow_consolidation_hint_with_cargo: This outbound includes restricted item types — consolidation may slow customs:

detail.title: Outbound detail
detail.cancel_dialog_desc: Cancelling will release the linked inbounds back to the selectable list.

confirm_label.title: Confirm shipping label
confirm_label.held_notice: This outbound is currently held; resolve first:
confirm_label.proceed_notice: Confirming will fetch the label using your carrier account. Shipping cost is billed directly by the carrier on your linked account — not from your ShipItAsia wallet.

shipped.page_subtitle: All your departed outbounds with carrier tracking
shipped.search_placeholder: Search by outbound ID, tracking number, or recipient (≥ 2 chars)
shipped.copy_fallback: Could not access clipboard; copy manually
shipped.no_track_url: This carrier does not expose a public tracking page

pick.choose_prompt: Pick an outbound from the left

pack.page_subtitle: Group inbounds into boxes; one box can hold multiple inbounds
pack.error_pick_first: Pick at least one inbound for this box

weigh.page_subtitle: Capture box dimensions + weight, then scan-confirm each box per outbound
weigh.weigh_queue_empty: No boxes waiting to be weighed
weigh.palletize_queue_empty: No outbounds waiting to be palletized
weigh.same_client_hint: Client {clientName} still has {count} unshipped outbound(s) — consider keeping together: {list}
weigh.no_active_session: No active palletize — scan any pending box to start
weigh.complete_pending: Verified, waiting for client confirm on OMS
weigh.pallet_instruction: Print and stick this label on the pallet; scan it later at the label-print station to retrieve.

label_print.page_subtitle: Staff prints each box label and attaches it
label_print.pallet_wrong_status: Outbound status is {status}; not at print-label stage
label_print.group_pending_hint: Client has not confirmed in OMS yet; you can push a reminder
label_print.group_pending_empty: No outbounds waiting on the client
label_print.detail_no_boxes: No pack box yet for this outbound

pick_batch.page_subtitle: Group today's outbounds into a picking wave for PDA shelf-scan picking
pick_batch.new_section_subtitle: Tick today's outbounds, create the batch, then press Start to begin picking

depart.page_subtitle: Staff confirms all boxes of an outbound have left the warehouse

outbound_list.page_subtitle: All outbounds in this warehouse, filterable by status
outbound_list.search_placeholder: Search outbound id / client / tracking no

receive.page_subtitle: Run receive (put-away) from desktop; mirrors the PDA flow for CS / new staff

wms_inbound_list.page_subtitle: All inbounds in this warehouse, filterable by status
wms_inbound_list.search_placeholder: Search inbound id / client / tracking / carrier code

wms_locations.page_subtitle: Manage location codes used by PDA put-away pickers

addresses.page_subtitle: Manage frequently used shipping addresses; pick them during inbound / outbound
addresses.label: Label (e.g. Home / Office)
addresses.name: Recipient
addresses.error_required: Fill all required fields (label / name / phone / city / address)
